final:
module top_module(
                input data_in_0,
                input data_in_1,
                input select,
                output data_out
                );assign data_out = select ? data_in_1 : data_in_0;
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      data_out <= ~select & data_in_0; data_out <= select & ~data_in_1;
    end
  end

endmodule
